name: The Port Washington State Bank
description_short: Port Washington State Bank is a community bank offering checking, savings, debit cards, credit cards, and online banking services with a focus on local relationships.
description_long: Port Washington State Bank is a traditional community bank serving the Port Washington area with a commitment to personalized customer service and local community engagement. The bank positions itself as offering a unique story and values connection with its community, as evidenced by their emphasis on sharing their narrative with customers on their website. The bank provides a full suite of standard banking services including personal and business online banking platforms, checking and savings accounts, debit card services, and credit card products. They offer the uChoose Rewards® Program for credit card holders and have integrated Zelle® for mobile money transfers, indicating modern digital banking capabilities alongside traditional services. What distinguishes Port Washington State Bank is its emphasis on community presence and local service, evidenced by specific community events like the Fredonia April Shred Event and their commitment to maintaining physical branch locations with published hours. The bank has also invested in customer service infrastructure, including a dedicated 24/7 Debit Card Services Line, suggesting a focus on accessibility and responsiveness to cardholder needs. The honest assessment is that while Port Washington State Bank appears to be a solid community banking option, the website provides limited detail about specific products (interest rates, fees, loan terms, minimum balances) that would allow comprehensive comparison to larger regional or national banks. The lack of detailed product information makes it difficult to assess competitiveness on rates and terms without direct contact.
services: Credit cards with uChoose Rewards® Program
Zelle® money transfer via mobile app
Lost/stolen debit card reporting and replacement
pros: 24/7 Debit Card Services Line for lost or stolen card support and card-related issues
Zelle® integration in mobile app for convenient peer-to-peer money transfers
uChoose Rewards® Program for credit card customers with incentive structure
Multiple access points with published branch locations and hours
Both personal and business online banking platforms available
Published rates page for transparency on deposit and loan products
Community engagement through local events like shred days
Tech-forward approach with mobile banking capabilities
cons: Website lacks specific details on APY rates, fees, and account minimums, requiring customers to contact bank directly for pricing information
Limited product descriptions make it difficult to compare offerings to competitors or understand full service range
No visible information about loan products, business lending, or mortgage services despite these being common at community banks
Minimal detail about financial strength, FDIC insurance coverage, or safety ratings
No information about CD rates or investment products that customers might expect from a traditional bank

contact.address: 206 N Franklin St, Port Washington, WI 53074

best_for: Local Port Washington area residents seeking community banking with personal relationships
Small business owners needing local bank support with dedicated business banking platform
Customers prioritizing mobile banking convenience with Zelle® integration and 24/7 support
Individuals wanting rewards-based credit card options with uChoose Rewards® Program
diagnosis: Port Washington State Bank is best suited for local customers and small businesses in the Port Washington area seeking traditional community banking with modern digital conveniences like Zelle® and mobile banking. The main caveat is that the website provides insufficient product detail and pricing information to properly evaluate competitiveness; potential customers must contact the bank directly to compare rates, fees, and terms against other banking options.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
